intro_desc: Enterprise systems where structural risk was reduced while operational decision capacity increased.
elis_title: Operational Modernization of a Legacy Logistics Core
elis_desc: A logistics platform constrained by manual processes, opaque business rules, and limited real-time visibility across enterprise clients.
elis_sol: Progressive modernization with structured control layers, real-time GIS integration, and decoupled frontend architecture.
elis_res: Full operational transparency and reduced systemic fragility across high-volume enterprise operations.
bank_title: Controlled GenAI Integration in a Banking Environment
bank_desc: High-risk government invoice processing requiring AI-assisted extraction without exposing private or regulated data.
bank_sol: Isolated AI Lambda with explicit input/output contracts, backend orchestration layer, prompt validation, and controlled failure handling.
bank_res: Secure AI adoption, reduced manual workload, and minimized architectural exposure in a regulated ecosystem.
nativas_desc: Tokenized carbon-credit platform requiring framework transition without compromising transactional integrity.
nativas_sol: Refactoring of critical components, separation of concerns, and migration of the operational core to a scalable architecture.
nativas_res: Preserved production continuity while enabling structural scalability for future expansion.
